## Checklist

- [ ] **No mixed UI + workflow refactor** — UI-only and clinical/workflow changes are in separate PRs when either is large or risky
- [ ] **Tested by role** — relevant roles exercised (see `docs/SMOKE_TEST_CHECKLIST.md` / `docs/CLINICAL_REGRESSION_MATRIX.md` as applicable)
- [ ] **Docs updated** — README, runbooks, or API notes changed if behavior or setup changed for humans
- [ ] **Checkpoint/tag created if major change** — e.g. `./scripts/pre-change-checkpoint.sh` before big edits; `./scripts/create-stability-tag.sh` after a stable milestone (`docs/RELEASE_CHECKPOINTS.md`)
